basics.name: Alexandre Vanryssel
basics.label: Tech Lead Freelance, Java & Web3
basics.summary: Experienced Tech Lead with 15+ years in software development, specialized in Java, Spring Boot, blockchain (Ethereum, Tezos, Avalanche, Sui) and AI. Led multidisciplinary teams, designed scalable architectures, and implemented DevOps/Cloud solutions (Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, Azure).

work.name: Adeo
highlights: Tech lead in a team of 10 working on costing products. Architecture, technical design, cross-cutting policies (quality, security, observability), recruitment.
Development, CI/CD and Ops
Tech: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, Neo4J, Angular, Vue.js, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, Github Copilot

work.name: Marigold
highlights: Manager of team developing Ligo (Tezos smart contract language). Team of 12 distributed worldwide.

work.name: Ineat Lab / Innovation Lab (Astek)
highlights: Technological watch on blockchain and AI. POCs, case studies, internal training, articles, conferences. Blockchain training - lab supervision at Supinfo Lille (2021). RAG/GraphRAG studies, knowledge graphs, model evaluation (Gemini, GPT, Llama, Claude).
Tech: Blockchain: React, JS/TS, Ethereum (Solidity), Tezos (Ligo). AI: Python, Jupyter, Ollama, Neo4J, Vector Search

work.name: Norauto (via Ineat Group)
highlights: Tech lead for Concept Store team. POC implementation and industrialization for new store concepts.
Tech: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Azure

work.name: Leroy Merlin (via Ineat Group)
highlights: Facilitation of a team of 5 people responsible for delivery promise for Leroymerlin.fr marketplace. Agile facilitation, slackbot development, team synchronization, participation in designs and architectures.
Tech: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, GCP

work.name: Adeo (via Ineat Group)
highlights: Intervention in 4 teams to introduce them to the basics of agility and support them in their evolution with Scrum or Kanban.

work.name: Oney Bank (via Ineat Group)
highlights: IT projects: tokenization/mobile payment integration, strong customer authentication, business API exposure. Scrum implementation, preliminary studies, technical/functional designs, architectures, POCs.
Tech: Java, Spring Boot

work.name: Leroy Merlin (via Ineat Group)
highlights: Mobility division: coordination of mobile sales application prototype. Consumer mobile apps team: complete iOS/Android redesign. Technical designs, user workshops (Lean Startup), team coordination, proximity management (6-10 people).
Tech: Android, iOS, Java

work.name: Humanis (via Ineat Group)
highlights: Group instance planning application. Team management (2 people), project planning (Planisware), budget monitoring, stakeholder coordination, MOA relationships, Java designs and development.
Tech: Java, Hibernate, Struts, JSP, Oracle, PostgreSQL

work.name: Sopra Group
highlights: Tech: Java, Hibernate, Struts, JSP, Oracle, PostgreSQL, Websphere, Tomcat

projects.name: Instampy.fr
highlights: Founder & architect, solo end-to-end delivery. Cloud-agnostic full-stack architecture with anti lock-in abstractions; modular multi-chain blockchain (Sui, Avalanche), Move/Solidity, compartmentalized gas fees. Nuxt SSR, REST API, PostgreSQL/Prisma, Stripe, GDPR FR/EN. Railway multi-env, GitHub Actions, monitoring, DNS/DMARC/DKIM.
Tech: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Supabase, Railway, Sui, Avalanche, Stripe

projects.name: Tezos Projects
highlights: Tezocracy: online tool to facilitate Tezos bakers' votes for governance proposals. Development in collaboration with MIDL.dev. https://tezocracy.xyz/
Testnet faucet: personal development, Tezos Foundation funding, integration as official faucet, handover to OxheadAlpha and maintenance, before transfer to the foundation.
Tech: React, Taquito, Tezos, Github Actions, Netlify
